case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 713 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2939/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case. 26-09-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Lastly the matter was fixed in Court on 20-04-2023 when the application for urgent hearing was dismissed. Thereafter no concrete efforts were made either by the Petitioner or her Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and her Counsel prima-facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
